title: Lesson Quiz: Cover Letters and Applications
description: Assessment of the concept that Writing and submitting professional documents.

questions.prompt: What is the purpose of a cover letter?

choices.text: To explain interest and qualifications in a professional way
choices.feedback: Correct. A cover letter explains interest and qualifications for an opportunity.

choices.text: To replace all other required documents
choices.feedback: A cover letter does not replace every other required document.
A cover letter should stay focused on the opportunity and qualifications.

choices.text: To avoid giving any details about the opportunity
choices.feedback: A cover letter should clearly connect to the opportunity.

questions.prompt: A complete application should include the materials required by the opportunity.

choices.feedback: A complete application should include the required materials.
Correct. Strong applications include the required materials and details.

questions.prompt: Which sentence sounds most appropriate for a professional application response?

choices.text: yo i think this would be fun so pick me
choices.feedback: This response is too informal for a professional application.

choices.text: I am interested in this opportunity and believe my experience and skills would be a strong fit
choices.feedback: This idea is related, but it does not best emphasize clear professional purpose and qualifications.

choices.text: I am applying because I am interested in the opportunity and can contribute relevant skills and effort
choices.feedback: Correct. This sentence is clear, professional, and focused on the opportunity.

choices.text: i just need something to do after school
choices.feedback: This response is too casual and does not show professional purpose.

questions.prompt: Why does completeness matter in an application submission?

choices.text: Because missing parts can weaken the quality of the submission
choices.feedback: This idea is related, but it does not best explain why following directions supports professional readiness.

choices.text: Because complete submissions show attention to directions and professionalism
choices.feedback: This idea is related, but it does not best explain how completeness strengthens an application.

choices.text: Because complete submissions help show responsibility and readiness for the opportunity
choices.feedback: This idea is related, but it does not best explain how completeness supports application quality and professional follow-through.

choices.text: Because complete submissions help present the student as organized, responsible, and prepared
choices.feedback: Correct. Completeness helps show professionalism, responsibility, and preparation.

questions.prompt: Professional applications should use clear writing and an appropriate tone.

choices.feedback: Correct. Professional applications should use clear writing and an appropriate tone.
Clear writing and appropriate tone are important in professional applications.
